subject: [PATCH v4 7/9] dax/kmem: extract hotplug/hotremove helper functions

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch refactors the kmem probe and remove functions in the dax/kmem driver by extracting initialization, cleanup, hotplug, and hot-remove logic into separate helper functions. The helpers enable future extensions to support more granular control over memory hotplug operations. The patch also addresses an issue where resources are not registered when probing occurs, preventing dax devices from being added to sysfs.
